news.title: Labor sends emergency delegation to defuse Asian gas alarm
news.snippet: Senior officials will travel to Asia this week in an attempt to douse a growing diplomatic crisis in countries unsettled by Australia’s plans for a gas reservation.

news.title: Data centres vow to fund Australia’s renewables shift, not derail it
news.snippet: As data centres’ power demand continues to surge, tech giants argue their deep corporate pockets will be an asset for Australia’s green transition.

news.title: Uber appeals against reinstating driver accused of speeding, racist remarks
news.snippet: The ride-share giant has appealed against an order to reinstate a driver with 16 misconduct allegations against him as the government updates deactivation laws.

news.title: Luai leads Tigers to epic final Leichhardt win
Trump reignites Anthropic feud after takedown of latest AI model
news.snippet: The feud between Anthropic and the Trump administration has deepened after the US government demanded the company take down one of its new AI models.

news.title: NRMA roadside assist staff on strike for first time in 23 years
news.snippet: The organisation said not all patrols would take part in industrial action, and it had made contingency arrangements to minimise disruption.

news.title: Quick hits: England camp raided by thieves as Scotland celebrations erupt
Knicks end 53-year drought to win NBA championship
Bird strikes and fume incidents ruffle feathers for Boeing and aviation regulators
news.snippet: The software fix for the Boeing 737 Max 8 – some of which are flown in Australia – won’t reach the full global fleet until mid-2028.

news.title: Musk’s net worth is now 5 million times that of an average family
news.snippet: The tech mogul just became the world’s first trillionaire, signalling an eye-watering new era of ultra-affluence and widening wealth inequality.

news.title: Elon Musk becomes world’s first trillionaire as SpaceX soars in Wall Street debut
news.snippet: Elon Musk is now worth more than the world’s next four richest people combined.
